meta.name: Wave Ff — EC finalists 1955-56 to 1969-70
meta.note: Complete. All 15 editions 1955-56 to 1969-70 have both finalists pickable (29 rosters built this wave; Inter 1964-65 was already pickable). Web-verified per edition via final match sheets (Real Madrid official site, Transfermarkt, The Celtic Wiki, Inter.it, AC Milan official, Wikipedia). Every promoted club-season removed from EC/UCL tier-O in the same pass. EC/UCL tier-O index is now at ZERO — all finalist club-seasons across the full competition history are pickable. O/P overlap = 0, P/P dups = 0. Eastern European and lesser-documented clubs carry conf C.
